query:
UPDATE media.movies
           SET title          = COALESCE($2, title),
               overview       = $3,
               poster_path    = COALESCE($4, poster_path),
               genres         = $5,
               release_date   = COALESCE($6, release_date),
               content_rating = $7,
               poster_urls    = $8,
               crew_json      = $9,
               meta_status    = 'ready',
               updated_at     = NOW()
           WHERE id = $1
